itemReviewed.name: Besant Arundale Senior Secondary School - Thiruvanmiyur

address.streetAddress: Kalakshetra Foundation,Thiruvanmiyur, X7Q7+J4J, Thiruvanmiyur, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600041, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
The best school to persue education where
the human values are taught and the best school in chennai which gives freedom to the
Students and the best place where we can bond with nature. The teachers are so friendly and caring, they care a lot about the students and every class has a maximum of 40 students hence it is very spacious,and each and every student is under notice of the teacher. And also it is the responsibility of the students to take academics  seriously and act accordingly. And also it is a very cultural school and a lot of competitions are organized in the school level and i would  rather say that it is the only school which allows students to participate in any Interschool event they want to without any expectations and hesitations !! I personally have participated and won many prizes in such competitions!! Coming back to academics the students are well trained and the school has good lab facilities!! The schools has a very good infrastructure!! Having studied in the school for almost 12 years (from 1st to 12th)  i would personally recommend to visit it atlest once and interact with the teachers before joining it . It has a very transparent schooling system and since it is aided by central government the fees is also least expensive compared to other CBSE schools!! The school  deserves more than just 5 stats!! Wanna go and visit my school again. The best part of my life is studying in B.A.S.S.❣️

itemReviewed.name: Besant Arundale Senior Secondary School - Thiruvanmiyur

itemListElement.reviewBody: The best school ever , you can learn not only education here.more than that.extra curricular is must.no school will mold you like doing here by find ing your talents and making u shine in the world..its a dream school.

itemReviewed.name: Besant Arundale Senior Secondary School - Thiruvanmiyur

itemListElement.reviewBody: Both my kids are been admitted last year with great expectations as it is a traditional school with open space.  But few teachers are very ecostic, fails to concentrate on weaker students. No properly organised sports day, annual day, intimations are given only a day before. Not even a group photo taken every year. Parents are admitting their kids looking into the name of kalashetra will get disappointed in knowing the politics inside the school. My son being the proficiency winner don't want to study there and in my daughter class only 20 students passed in english(including her) out of 47 because of bad english coaching. Management support the old teachers even if they are not upto the mark. We are forced to change them into other school since they don't want the parents to bring any remarks about the school. Lot of theft happening then and there.Toilet is in horrible condition and girls avoid using it most of the time.

itemReviewed.name: Besant Arundale Senior Secondary School - Thiruvanmiyur

itemListElement.reviewBody: Really a good school which is student friendly teachers.......good study campus....with more learning space

itemReviewed.name: Besant Arundale Senior Secondary School - Thiruvanmiyur

itemListElement.reviewBody: One of the best school with wonderful couching and a spacious and greenfull campus, now I am missing those wonderful campus and a caring teachers and i often think that it was a chance given to me by the god to study their for almost 12yrs from LKG-10th .
